## Verification

- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when routing, live workout flow, Bluetooth, persistence, or PWA behavior changed
- [ ] `npm run format:check` when Markdown, config, or broad formatting changed
